name: SUPERCYCLE by Billy Restey
description: Recursively calling inscriptions on Bitcoin to use as individual pixels—SUPERCYCLE celebrates 2 years of the ordinals protocol and 16 years of the Bitcoin blockchain. As time passes, these technologies only get stronger. The history, artwork, and culture embedded on-chain will serve as an immutable library for future generations. This piece is a token of where we are and where we are going. As the universe expands, so does Bitcoin.Edition of 69
